0: Because you defeated [Color:0x5]Him[Color:0x0], there are changes
appearing throughout the various universes. This
is not necessarily a bad thing, but there are a
few who lost their purpose and are being wiped
from existence. This is similar to recent history
being undone. If you would [Color:0x5]like to help them[Color:0x0],
please [Color:0x5]accept this quest[Color:0x0].
[END]
1: ダミー
